title: irvingiaceae
intro: The Irvingiaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. Irvingiaceae is a family of plants that consists of five species of trees and shrubs, primarily found in tropical Africa. These plants are characterized by their distinctive flowers and fruit, which often have a unique, umbrella-like shape. They are an important part of the ecosystem in their native habitats, providing food and shelter for various animals and insects.
